title: Orbital Strike Arrow
description: This project adds the Orbital Strike Arrow, but with commands! This was inspired by Flowtives Arrow Cannon in Heartless Horizons.
body:
/orbitalstrike <amount> | /stabshot <amount>
The Orbital Arrow plugin is a high-impact tactical combat addition for Paper/Spigot servers that introduces a devastating "Orbital Strike" mechanic. Designed for high-stakes gameplay or admin-led events, the plugin centers around a specialized "Orbital Strike Cannon"—a uniquely tagged fishing rod that acts as a remote designator for celestial bombardment. When a player right-clicks while holding the rod, the plugin utilizes an advanced ray-tracing system to pinpoint a target up to 200 blocks away, whether it be a specific entity or a block on the horizon.

Once triggered, the designated area is immediately engulfed in a torrential rain of thousands of high-velocity arrows. The "ORBITAL" variant unleashes a staggering 3,000 arrows alongside a massive explosion of particles and a bonus area-of-effect shockwave that deals 1,000 damage to any living entity within an 8-block radius, ensuring a near-instant kill for even the most heavily armored targets. A lighter "STABSHOT" version provides a more focused but still lethal 500-arrow barrage. The plugin features custom "shot by" death messages for added immersion and consumes the single-use rod upon activation. It is a perfect tool for server owners looking to add a "superweapon" feel to their world, balancing raw power with high-precision targeting.
